journal.title: Trading Journal
journal.notes_placeholder: What did you learn from this trade?
journal.must_fill: Required before you can trade again

lock.tip_1: Review your last 3 trades in Journal
lock.tip_2: Check patterns: early entry? Tight SL?
lock.tip_3: Take a break, don't look at charts

reflection.title: Reflection Before Continuing
reflection.subtitle: You were locked due to 3 consecutive losses.
reflection.q1: What was the main mistake in your last 3 trades?
reflection.q2_placeholder: Example: wait for confirmation, set wider SL...
reflection.q3: How do you feel right now?
reflection.upset_warning: Recommend waiting another hour before trading

evaluation.title: Evaluation Mode
evaluation.subtitle: Total drawdown reached 10R
evaluation.cant_trade: Trading paused until review is complete
evaluation.after_review: After review: high water mark reset, phase returns to Phase 1

onboarding.connect_subtitle: Select your exchange and enter your API key
onboarding.api_hint: Only enable Read + Trade permissions. DO NOT enable Withdraw.
onboarding.safe_note: Your funds stay safe on the exchange
onboarding.rules_subtitle: These rules protect you from psychological mistakes
onboarding.accept: I have read and agree to these trading rules

auth.magic_link: Or sign in with magic link
auth.magic_link_sent: Check your email for the login link!

landing.hero_title:
Trade Without Emotions.
Profit Without Drama.
landing.hero_subtitle: Garda protects you from the psychological mistakes that destroy 80% of beginner traders.
landing.cta_sub: No credit card needed. Start trading immediately.
landing.problem_title: Why Do 80% of Beginner Traders Lose Capital?
landing.problem_1_desc: Lose, then immediately open another position. High emotion, zero analysis.
landing.problem_2_desc: Using 50x-125x leverage. One wrong candle = margin call.
landing.problem_3_desc: 10 trades a day, all random entries. No plan, no stop loss.
landing.problem_closing: It's not the strategy that's wrong. It's uncontrolled emotions.
landing.f1_desc: Every trade is automatically calculated. Max risk 1% per trade. Non-negotiable.
landing.f2_desc: 3 consecutive losses? Account auto-locked. Cool down, review, come back stronger.
landing.f3_desc: Start strict, unlock more flexibility as you prove consistency.
landing.f4_desc: Every trade auto-logged. See emotional patterns and when you tend to lose.
landing.f5_desc: Bybit, Binance, OKX. Your funds stay on the exchange. We never hold your money.
landing.how_1_desc: Enter your API key. Read + Trade permission only.
landing.how_2_desc: You choose pair and direction. Garda enforces risk limits.
landing.pricing_desc: Garda is completely free for everyone. Sign up and start trading with full protection.
landing.pricing_note: Early adopters get special perks when Pro plans launch.
